STA2E.Editor.Title: Stardate Editor
STA2E.Manager.Title: Campaign Manager
STA2E.Notifications.DefaultCreated: Default campaign created. Open ⚙ to configure.
STA2E.Notifications.GMOnly: Only the GM can confirm travel.
STA2E.Notifications.SelectTokenFirst: STA2e Toolkit: Select a token first to open the Combat HUD.
STA2E.Notifications.NoShipActors: STA2e Toolkit: No starship actors found in the world.
STA2E.WildcardNamer.MenuHint: Assign rollable tables to actor traits so wildcard tokens receive random names when placed.
STA2E.Zones.ShowBordersHint: When enabled, zone borders and labels are shown as subtle overlays visible to all users.
STA2E.Zones.RulerOverrideHint: Annotate ruler measurements with zone count, STA range band, and terrain momentum costs.
STA2E.Zones.DifficultTerrainHint: Mark this zone as difficult terrain. Automatically sets momentum cost to at least 1.
STA2E.Zones.DragRulerHint: Show zone count, range band, and movement limit indicators while dragging tokens.
STA2E.Zones.MovementLogHint: Post a chat message when a token moves between zones. Can be overridden per-scene.
STA2E.Zones.ZonesEnabledHint: Show zone overlay and enable zone-aware ruler and drag ruler on this scene.
STA2E.Zones.SceneMovementLogHint: Override the global movement log setting for this scene.
STA2E.Zones.Hazard.Title: Hazards
STA2E.Zones.Hazard.Label: Label
STA2E.Settings.WildcardNamer.Name: Wildcard Token Namer
STA2E.Settings.WildcardNamer.Label: Configure Token Name Tables
STA2E.Settings.WildcardNamer.Hint: Assign rollable tables to actor traits so wildcard tokens receive random names when placed.
STA2E.Settings.EffectConfig.Name: Sounds & Animations
STA2E.Settings.EffectConfig.Label: Configure Sounds & Animations
STA2E.Settings.EffectConfig.Hint: Set audio paths and animation overrides for weapons and tasks.
STA2E.Settings.ShowZoneBorders.Name: Show Zone Borders During Play
STA2E.Settings.ShowZoneBorders.Hint: When enabled (default), zone borders and labels are visible to all players on scenes that have zones. Disable to hide zones entirely during play.
STA2E.Settings.ZoneRulerOverride.Name: Zone-Aware Ruler
STA2E.Settings.ZoneRulerOverride.Hint: Annotate ruler measurements with zone count, STA range band (Contact/Close/Medium/Long), and terrain momentum costs when zones are defined on the scene.
STA2E.Settings.ZoneBorderStyleDefault.Hi: Default border style applied to newly created zones.
STA2E.Settings.ZoneBorderWidth.Name: Zone Border Width
STA2E.Settings.ZoneBorderWidth.Hint: Thickness in pixels of zone border lines. Can also be changed live in the Zone Editor toolbar.
STA2E.Settings.ZoneShowLabels.Name: Show Zone Labels During Play
STA2E.Settings.ZoneShowLabels.Hint: Show zone name labels in play mode. Can also be toggled per scene via Scene Config.
STA2E.Settings.ZoneDragRuler.Name: Zone-Aware Token Drag Overlay
STA2E.Settings.ZoneDragRuler.Hint: Show zone count, range band, momentum cost, and movement limit indicators while dragging tokens on scenes with zones defined.
STA2E.Settings.ZoneMovementLog.Name: Zone Movement Log
STA2E.Settings.ZoneMovementLog.Hint: Post a chat message when a token moves between zones. Can be overridden per-scene.
STA2E.Settings.ElevationRuler.Name: Token Hover — 3D Distance Label
STA2E.Settings.ElevationRuler.Hint: When a token is selected and you hover over another token, show the true 3D distance (√(horizontal² + Δelevation²)) as a floating label on the canvas.
STA2E.Settings.ShowMinutes.Name: Show Minutes on HUD
STA2E.Settings.ShowMinutes.Hint: Display HH:MM on the Stardate HUD. If disabled, only hours are shown.
STA2E.Settings.HudVisibility.Name: HUD Visible To
STA2E.Settings.HudVisibility.Hint: Who can see the Stardate HUD.
STA2E.Settings.HudTheme.Name: HUD Color Theme
STA2E.Settings.HudTheme.Hint: Visual theme for the Stardate HUD. Each theme matches a Star Trek era's actual computer aesthetic.
STA2E.Settings.StressMode.Name: Stress Tracking Mode
STA2E.Settings.StressMode.Hint: Countdown: characters start with a full stress pool and spend it to avoid injuries (value decreases toward 0). Count-up: stress accumulates from 0 toward the maximum, like damage (value increases).
STA2E.Settings.StressMode.Countdown: Countdown — stress pool spent to avoid injuries (default)
STA2E.Settings.NpcPersonalThreatSource.H: Choose where notable and major NPCs pull Personal Threat from. Combined modes total both stores and spend from the listed source first.
STA2E.Settings.NpcPersonalThreatSource.A: Combined — NPC sheet first, then token
STA2E.Settings.NpcPersonalThreatSource.T: Combined — token first, then NPC sheet
STA2E.Settings.Jb2aTier.Name: JB2A Asset Tier
STA2E.Settings.Jb2aTier.Hint: Select which version of JB2A you have installed. Free uses jb2a_patreon-free paths; Patron uses the full jb2a_patreon module paths.
STA2E.Settings.AutoVaporizeMinorNpc.Name: Ground Combat — Auto-Vaporize Minor NPCs on Instant Death
STA2E.Settings.AutoVaporizeMinorNpc.Hint: When a minor NPC is killed by an eligible weapon (phaser, disruptor, grenade, Jem'Hadar), automatically play the vaporize effect and remove the token without prompting. Disable to always show the outcome dialog.
Ship Destruction — Delete Token After Animation
When a ship is destroyed, fade out the token and delete it from the scene after the explosion animation completes. Disable to keep the token on the canvas.
STA2E.Settings.BreachTokenFX.Name: Ship Damage — Token Magic Breach FX
STA2E.Settings.BreachTokenFX.Hint: Show progressive damage splash effects on ship tokens as they take breaches. Requires Token Magic FX module.
STA2E.Settings.BreachTrailFX.Name: Ship Damage — Warp Core Breach Visual FX
STA2E.Settings.BreachTrailFX.Hint: Show a persistent steam effect on tokens with an active warp core breach warning. Follows the token as it moves. Requires Sequencer and JB2A (free or Patreon) modules.
STA2E.Settings.UseDiceSoNice.Name: Adv. Dice Roller — Use Dice So Nice
STA2E.Settings.UseDiceSoNice.Hint: Show 3D dice animations via Dice So Nice when rolling in the Advanced Dice Roller. Requires the Dice So Nice module to be installed and active.
STA2E.Settings.InteractiveDicePayment.Hi: If enabled, replaces the standard extra dice slider in the roller with interactive drag-and-drop slots for Momentum and Threat.
STA2E.Settings.OverrideSheetRoller.Name: Use Toolkit Dice Roller on Character Sheet
STA2E.Settings.OverrideSheetRoller.Hint: Intercepts attribute-test clicks on actor sheets and opens the STA2e Toolkit roller instead of the system dialog. GMs can right-click a character token to assign preferred ships for that character.
STA2E.Settings.ThemeCharacterSheet.Name: Apply Toolkit Theme to Character Sheets
STA2E.Settings.ThemeCharacterSheet.Hint: Reskins STA2e actor sheets to match the active HUD theme (LCARS TNG, TOS Panel, etc.). Toggle off to restore system default styling.
STA2E.Settings.AlertVolume.Name: Alert Sound Volume
STA2E.Settings.AlertVolume.Hint: Volume for alert sounds on this client (0 = silent, 1 = full volume). Each user can set this independently.
STA2E.Settings.PlayersCanSetAlert.Name: Players Can Change Alert Status
STA2E.Settings.PlayersCanSetAlert.Hint: If enabled, players can change the ship's alert condition, not just the GM.
STA2E.Settings.AlertSoundLoop.Name: Red Alert Sound — Loop
STA2E.Settings.AlertSoundLoop.Hint: If enabled, the Red Alert sound loops continuously until the condition changes. Disable to play the file once.
STA2E.Keybinding.ToggleCombatHud.Name: Toggle Combat HUD
STA2E.Keybinding.ToggleCombatHud.Hint: Open or close the Quick Action Combat HUD for the selected token.
STA2E.Keybinding.OpenTransporter.Name: Open Transporter Control
STA2E.Keybinding.OpenTransporter.Hint: Open the Transporter Control dialog (GM only).
STA2E.Keybinding.OpenSocialOpposedTask.H: Open the Social Opposed Task builder (GM only).
STA2E.Keybinding.ToggleZoneEditor.Name: Toggle Zone Editor
STA2E.Keybinding.ToggleZoneEditor.Hint: Open or close the Zone Editor toolbar (GM only).
STA2E.SceneControl.Sta2eWidget.Title: STA2e Toolkit
STA2E.Alert.Heading: ALERT
STA2E.Alert.Tab.ShowHide: Show/hide Alert Status (click to pin open)
STA2E.Widget.Title: STA2e Toolkit
STA2E.Widget.CloseButton.Title: Close widget
STA2E.Widget.Button.CombatHud.Label: Combat HUD
STA2E.Widget.Button.CombatHud.Hint: Open Combat HUD for selected token (Shift+H)
STA2E.Widget.Button.NpcRoller.Label: Adv. Dice Roller
STA2E.Widget.Button.Transporter.Label: Transporter
STA2E.Widget.Button.ZoneEditor.Label: Zone Editor
STA2E.Widget.Button.ZoneEditor.Hint: Open / close the Zone Editor toolbar
STA2E.Widget.Button.ZoneMonitor.Label: Zone Monitor
STA2E.Widget.Button.HoverDistance.Label: Hover Distance
STA2E.Widget.Button.HoverDistance.Hint: Toggle 3D distance label when hovering tokens
